name: pkpkdupr
description: Pickleball DUPR System - Monorepo with pnpm

scripts.dev: mkdir -p data/db && ENABLE_DEV_MOCK_DATA=true DB_FILE_PATH=file:$PWD/data/db/db.sqlite pnpm -r --parallel dev
scripts.dev:monitoring: mkdir -p data/db && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d --no-deps prometheus grafana db-exporter
scripts.dev:monitoring:down: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml stop grafana prometheus db-exporter
scripts.prepare: node --input-type=module -e "import { existsSync } from 'node:fs'; if (existsSync('./scripts/setup-git-hooks.mjs')) await import('./scripts/setup-git-hooks.mjs')"
